pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent dependency to version 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missed features, and the recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to reflect the target JDK for the project.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; the build tool needs to know the target source and release version to compile correctly.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using the old import causes a compile error (package not found).

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Remove @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.
Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on Spring Boot 3 / Java 17+.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Migrate WebSocket imports from javax.websocket to jakarta.websocket to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: The javax.websocket package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (used by Spring Boot 3); code using javax.websocket will fail to compile due to missing classes.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Migrate WebSocket imports from javax.websocket to jakarta.websocket to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: Compilation failure: the javax.websocket package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing 'package javax.websocket does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Nonnull with jakarta.annotation.Nonnull to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing a compile error (cannot find symbol) if the old import is retained.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for cleaner string interpolation.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.before: String.format("完成转换 文件：%s 目标路径：%s 文件名：%s", fromFile, toPath, fileName)
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.after: "完成转换 文件：%s 目标路径：%s 文件名：%s".formatted(fromFile, toPath, fileName)

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for cleaner string interpolation.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.before: String.format("Exception In Video Convert: %s %s %s", fromFile, toPath, fileName)

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for cleaner string interpolation.

src/test/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Test import with JUnit 5 @Test import to align with Spring Boot 3 test dependencies.
src/test/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are no longer on the classpath by default in Spring Boot 3, causing a compile error for the missing import.

src/test/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Remove unused JUnit 4 runner import as the test class no longer uses @RunWith.
